entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: SDI SERVICE
entities.description: A monthly Selective Dissemination of Information service provided to users

entities.name: USERS
entities.description: Recipients of the SDI service across various countries

entities.name: COUNTRIES
entities.description: Geographic locations where SDI service users are based

entities.name: CORE FUNDS
entities.description: Internal funding source for the SDI service

entities.name: SPECIAL PROJECT
entities.description: External project-based funding source for the SDI service

entities.name: CAPACITY TO PAY
entities.description: A criterion used to identify user segments for charging the SDI service

entities.name: PURPOSE OF SEEKING INFORMATION
entities.description: A criterion used to identify user segments for charging the SDI service, distinguishing between profit-making and public good

entities.name: AVAILABILITY OF INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: A criterion used to identify user segments for charging the SDI service based on institutional or national availability

entities.name: PRICING OBJECTIVES
entities.description: Goals established to determine the pricing of the SDI service

entities.name: PRICING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to calculate the price for the SDI service

entities.name: PRIVATE SECTOR
entities.description: A specific user segment for which a pricing formula is described
